planner.description: Read-only planner for task splitting, dependencies, and batch suggestions.

explorer.description: Read-only explorer for codebase, logs, configuration, and root-cause discovery.

worker.description: Bounded implementation agent. Use only with explicit task contract and file scope.

verifier.description: Independent verifier for requirements, evidence, deliverables, and risks.

memory-curator.description: Retrospective and memory hygiene agent. Proposes filtered growth candidates.
